title: Throwing Dynamite
description: Throwing Dynamite adds dynamite to the game, included in the mod are throwable dynamites of different types, some simply explode more than the normal dynamite, and some spawn fire when they explode.
body:
# 🧨 Throwing Dynamites 🧨
Adds throwable dynamite to the game, this entire mod is inspired by a r4t video where they included a pipebomb that you could throw, and it'd explode on contact, so why not make dynamite do that as well?

# ❓Why use Throwing Dynamites❓
### Demolitionists are jealous of you.
Demolitionists wish they were you, they'd wish they could throw dynamites everywhere with no rules just like you.

### ⛏️Become a successful miner without using pickaxes⛏️
You can use dynamite to dig out a large area, especially with the high explosive dynamite which takes out a solid chunk of the earth.

### 😂Funny to use😂
In conclusion, it's fun to use when just messing about, plus it's not that hard to create a lot of dynamite, so go ahead and throw some explosives!

# 🔎Quick Guide🔍
### 🛠️Dynamite Crafting Recipe🛠️
To craft the normal dynamite, you can use JEI to see the crafting there, however, if *somehow* you can't use JEI, then here is the recipe:

![Dynamite Recipe](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/69365498/235617960-4c165439-8231-455a-b917-6479dd0442b9.png)

### 🗄️Other types of dynamite🗄️
You can craft these by simply putting dynamite as the base in the smithing table, and then putting some item in the second slot, for example:
- Dynamite + Fire Charge = Thermite Dynamite
- Dynamite + TNT = High Explosive Dynamite

# ❓Questions & Answers❗
### Q: Will you add more types of dynamite?
### A: I will add more in future updates, I might even make a separate mod that adds an entirely new set of dynamite, you may never know.
------
### Q: Why are there no blocks in this mod?
### A1: This is because it is a specifically throwing item mod, meaning it wouldn't make sense to have blocks that you ***can't*** throw.
### A2: as I said before I could easily make an addon that adds blocks of dynamite.
